files.remark: Active FastAPI server (3563L). Embeds all HTTP routes + workflow execution + background threads. Target: split into api/routes/* files.
Parses opencode.jsonc to find available models. Target: opencode/config.py.
Compatibility shim. Re-exports server_legacy. Will be deleted in new structure.
Legacy Python http.server with 3000L. Still referenced by services/legacy.py. Will be deleted.
Empty init. Will be deleted.
Thin facade over server_legacy functions. Will be deleted.
SQLite CRUD (1354L). Target: split into db/ops/* by domain.
Legacy exports (26L). Will be deleted.
Legacy interface (594L, 2 prompts). Will be deleted (superseded by flow_01/interface.py).
Legacy test (200L). Will be deleted.
Legacy Flow01Workflow (273L). Will be deleted.
Empty init.
Provider base class (32L). Will be deleted (only opencode used).
OpenCode CLI provider (281L). Will be deleted.
OpenCode HTTP provider (897L). Will be deleted (use direct opencode client).
Package docstring. Will be replaced by task_hounds_api/opencode/__init__.py.
Backend registry (81L, 1 prompt). Only opencode used. Will be deleted.
Package docstring. Backends abstraction will be DELETED (only OpenCode used).
BackendAdapter abstract class (86L). Will be deleted.
Legacy Hermes adapter (67L). NOT USED. Will be deleted.
Legacy OpenClaw adapter (75L). NOT USED. Will be deleted.

OpenCodeAdapter class (477L). Implements BackendAdapter: start/stop/health/run with `opencode run --attach`. Has heartbeat + permission-watcher threads. KEEP as reference — migrate to opencode/adapter.py and merge core logic into opencode/client.py. Currently imports api.model_validation (backwards dep).
find_opencode_bin() (43L). Reads settings.json. Will move to opencode/binary.py.
HTTP/SSE client to OpenCode (384L). Will move to opencode/client.py.
OpenCodeLifecycleManager (911L). Health, crash recovery, external attach, multi-topology. Will be simplified in opencode/lifecycle.py.
OpenCodeSupervisor (509L). Process spawn, port finding. Will be simplified in opencode/process.py.
Unified JsonResult contract (140L, 6 funcs). ok() / err() builders + status constants. All backend adapters return this shape. KEEP — move to opencode/result.py or workflow/result.py.

Task Hounds DB Skill v1 (575L). Validates role_session_id format, provides read_project_context / read_table / write_operation. Has READABLE_TABLES + WRITE_OPS role-scoped allowlists. KEEP — move to skills/db_skill.py unchanged.
CLI wrapper for db_skill (133L). argparse subcommands: validate, read-project-context, read-table, write. KEEP — move to skills/db_tool.py unchanged.
Public exports for flow_01. Re-exported in workflow/__init__.py.
Signal adapters: FastApiServiceSignalAdapter writes to agent_registry + stream files (131L). Target: workflow/signals.py.
Env var config (16L). Target: workflow/config.py or just .env.example.
LangGraph StateGraph + 7 nodes + checkpointing (635L, 4 prompts). Target: workflow/graph.py.
Data contract + FlowStorage SQLite adapter (714L, 2 prompts). Will be split: workflow/models.py + db/ops/workflow.py.
Demo script (91L). Will be deleted (demo only).
Demo script (60L). Will be deleted (demo only).
Test driver (74L). Target: docs/testing/scripts/ or deleted.
flow_01 pytest suite (490L, 20 funcs, 10 test scenarios). Tests workflow.run_loops() with fake DB. KEEP — move to tests/.
Manager/Worker/Reviewer executors + baseline sequential (804L, 6 prompts). Target: workflow/executor.py.
Package docstring. Will be replaced.
Shared agent utilities (1589L). send_to_agent, file I/O, prompts, DB calls. Target: workflow/executor.py + agent_prompts/*.md.
manager_cycle() (910L, 9 prompts). Legacy non-LangGraph manager. Will be replaced by flow_01 graph nodes.
Reviewer trigger (177L, 1 prompt). Will be replaced by OpenCodeReviewerExecutor.
worker_cycle() (155L, 1 prompt). One task execution. Will be replaced by OpenCodeWorkerExecutor.
Package docstring. MVP module will be DELETED (replaced by flow_01).
Legacy MVP CLI runner (298L). run_loop() with manager/worker polling, TMUX idle check, auto-release, todo-stop. Will be DELETED (replaced by flow_01 LangGraph + workflow/loop.py).
Package docstring. Will be replaced by core/task_hounds_api/__init__.py with clean public API.
CLI entry point (4L). Calls power_teams.cli.main. Will be replaced by task_hounds_api/workflow/__main__.py.
Package docstring. Will be replaced by task_hounds_api/workflow/__init__.py.
CLI dispatcher (14L). Currently delegates to OpenCodeSupervisor. Will become task_hounds_api/cli.py entry.

migration_notes.to: core/task_hounds_api/ (db, opencode, workflow, skills, api, agent_prompts)
key_design_decisions: Single DB (core/db/power_teams.db) — flow_01's separate temp-power-teams.db deleted
DB-as-whiteboard: every step reads DB at start, writes DB at end
Manager flow: digest -> plan -> todo -> select -> release; if no plan/todo/suggestion, re-digest
All agent prompts moved to .md files in agent_prompts/
All signals via DB writes (no more stream files)
Strict layer order: db -> opencode -> workflow -> skills -> api (no reverse deps)
No backend_registry, no integrations/, no fallback to hermes/openclaw
FastAPI 3563L mega-file split into 8 small route files
